title: heteropappus hispidus
intro: Heteropappus hispidus, also known as the hairy false hawthorn or hairy silver bush, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral properties. The health benefits of Heteropappus hispidus include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and soothing respiratory problems. The plant is often prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat various health conditions.
